final_files.tests/test_final.py:
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone

from mesh_queue import repository as repo


def _event(event_id, *, cause="imminent_eval", correlation_id=None, created_at, locked=False):
    return repo.Event(
        id=event_id,
        source_node_id="source",
        cause=cause,
        payload={"original": event_id},
        correlation_id=correlation_id or f"cid-{event_id}",
        created_at=created_at,
        locked=locked,
    )


def _enqueue(db, *, cause="brain_market_snapshots", correlation_id="protected", now=None):
    return repo.enqueue_activation(
        db,
        source_node_id="nm_event_bus",
        cause=cause,
        payload={"signal_type": cause},
        correlation_id=correlation_id,
        now=now or datetime(2026, 6, 4, 2, 0),
    )


def test_fresh_imminent_rows_are_not_shed(monkeypatch):
    monkeypatch.setattr(repo, "MAX_PENDING_QUEUE_DEPTH", 2)
    now = datetime(2026, 6, 4, 2, 0)
    db = repo.MemorySession([
        _event(1, created_at=now - timedelta(minutes=29)),
        _event(2, created_at=now - timedelta(minutes=5)),
    ])
    assert _enqueue(db, now=now) == -1
    assert all(event.status == "pending" for event in db.events)


def test_non_imminent_stale_rows_are_not_shed(monkeypatch):
    monkeypatch.setattr(repo, "MAX_PENDING_QUEUE_DEPTH", 2)
    old = datetime(2026, 6, 4, 0, 0)
    db = repo.MemorySession([
        _event(1, cause="setup_vitals_change", created_at=old),
        _event(2, cause="brain_market_snapshots", created_at=old),
    ])
    assert _enqueue(db, now=datetime(2026, 6, 4, 2, 0)) == -1
    assert all(event.status == "pending" for event in db.events)


def test_over_cap_queue_never_sheds(monkeypatch):
    monkeypatch.setattr(repo, "MAX_PENDING_QUEUE_DEPTH", 2)
    old = datetime(2026, 6, 4, 0, 0)
    db = repo.MemorySession([_event(i, created_at=old) for i in (1, 2, 3)])
    assert _enqueue(db, now=datetime(2026, 6, 4, 2, 0)) == -1
    assert len([event for event in db.events if event.status == "dead"]) == 0
    assert repo.pending_queue_depth(db) == 3


def test_exhausted_correlation_rejects_before_shedding(monkeypatch):
    monkeypatch.setattr(repo, "MAX_PENDING_QUEUE_DEPTH", 3)
    monkeypatch.setattr(repo, "MAX_EVENTS_PER_CORRELATION", 3)
    old = datetime(2026, 6, 4, 0, 0)
    db = repo.MemorySession([
        _event(i, correlation_id="same", created_at=old + timedelta(seconds=i))
        for i in (1, 2, 3)
    ])
    assert _enqueue(db, correlation_id="same", now=datetime(2026, 6, 4, 2, 0)) == -1
    assert all(event.status == "pending" for event in db.events)


def test_locked_oldest_row_is_skipped_and_next_eligible_row_is_shed(monkeypatch):
    monkeypatch.setattr(repo, "MAX_PENDING_QUEUE_DEPTH", 3)
    old = datetime(2026, 6, 4, 0, 0)
    db = repo.MemorySession([
        _event(1, created_at=old, locked=True),
        _event(2, created_at=old),
        _event(3, created_at=old + timedelta(minutes=1)),
    ])
    assert _enqueue(db, now=datetime(2026, 6, 4, 2, 0, tzinfo=timezone.utc)) == 4
    assert db.events[0].status == "pending"
    assert db.events[1].status == "dead"
    assert db.events[1].payload["original"] == 2
    assert repo.pending_queue_depth(db) == 3
